hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); blocked=['.env', '.env.local', '.env.production', 'credentials', 'secrets', '.git/']; sys.exit(2 if any(b in path for b in blocked) else 0)"

python3 -c "import json, sys, subprocess; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); ext=path.rsplit('.',1)[-1] if '.' in path else ''; subprocess.run(['npx','prettier','--write',path], capture_output=True) if ext in ['ts','tsx','js','jsx'] else None"

python3 -c "import json, sys, subprocess; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['uv','run','black',path], capture_output=True) if path.endswith('.py') else None"

notify-send 'Claude Code' 'Needs your attention' 2>/dev/null || powershell.exe -Command "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::LoadWithPartialName('System.Windows.Forms'); [System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox]::Show('Needs your attention','Claude Code')" 2>/dev/null || true
